title: Lake (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Ahch-To_hidden_lake.png|thumb|right|250px|A hidden lake on Ahch-To]]
A '''lake''' was a large body of some substance, usually [[Water/Legends|water]], contained on a body of land.
*'''[[Alaphoe Lake]]''', [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]]
*'''[[Lake Andrasha]]''', [[Chandrila]]
*'''[[Lake Anre]]''', [[Tatooine]]
**The [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] version of '''[[Lake Anre/Legends|Lake Anre]]'''

*'''[[Bluestone Lake]]''', [[Bellassa/Legends|Bellassa]]
*'''[[Clear Lake]]''', [[Senali]]
*'''[[Cloud Lake]]''', Bellassa
*'''[[Cloud Lake District]]'''
*'''[[Dzavak Lakes]]''', [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]
*'''[[Echo Lake]]''', [[Tasariq]]
*'''[[Lake Grallia]]''', [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]]
*'''[[Harmony Lake]]''', [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]]
*'''[[Ahch-To hidden lake|Hidden lake]]''', [[Ahch-To]]

*'''[[Lake Joko]]''', [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]]

*'''[[Lake Krul]]''', unnamed planet in the [[Balowa system/Legends|Balowa system]]

*'''[[Lir Lake]]''', [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]
*'''[[Lutris Lake]]''', [[Tynna/Legends|Tynna]]

*'''[[Melody Lake]]''', [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8]]
*'''[[Moonstone Lake]]''', Bellassa
*'''[[Lake Natth]]''', [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]]
*'''[[Northern Lakes]]''', [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]
*'''[[Nub Shanda]]''', Endor
*'''[[Lake Paonga]]''', [[Naboo]]
**The Legends version of '''[[Lake Paonga/Legends|Lake Paonga]]'''
